result.summary: llamaindex.ai exposes a LlamaCloud REST API, a public documentation REST API, a public documentation MCP server, and the LiteParse CLI.
result.description: LlamaIndex provides software for building LLM applications over data, including the managed LlamaCloud document-processing platform and the open-source LiteParse parser. Its products cover document parsing, extraction, classification, indexing, and developer tooling.

llamacloud_api_key.label: LlamaCloud API key
llamacloud_api_key.setup: Sign in to the [LlamaCloud API Dashboard](https://cloud.llamaindex.ai/) and create an API key for your account/workspace. The docs' quickstart points developers to the dashboard and an API key page under [API key docs](https://developers.llamaindex.ai/llamaparse/general/api_key). Use that key with LlamaCloud services such as Parse, Extract, Classify, Split, Sheets, and Index.
